name: @calebcall/camera-ui-amcrest
description: Integrates Amcrest and Dahua-compatible IP cameras, doorbells and PTZ cameras into camera.ui via their native CGI API, with discovery, live streaming, two-way audio, PTZ, and motion, object, audio and doorbell events.
author: calebcall (https://github.com/calebcall/camera-ui-amcrest)

scripts.bundle: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && cui bundle
scripts.bundle:dev: npm run build && cross-env MODE=development cui bundle
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if(!process.env.SAFE_PUBLISH){console.error('Error: Please use @camera.ui/cli to publish the plugin');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.publish:alpha: npm i --save --force && npm run bundle && cui publish --alpha
scripts.publish:beta: npm i --save --force && npm run bundle && cui publish --beta
scripts.publish:latest: npm i --save --force && npm run bundle && cui publish --latest
